title: PUBLISH_KEY_PACKAGE write path has no per-user row count cap
description: save_key_package in relay/src/store.rs uses INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE keyed on (pub_id, device_id). Each distinct device_id creates a new row. MAX_KEY_PACKAGES_PER_USER=10 is only a read-side LIMIT in get_all_key_packages — no write-side enforcement exists. A user can publish across many device_ids and accumulate unbounded rows. Fix: in save_key_package, before the upsert, count existing rows for pub_id and reject if >= MAX_KEY_PACKAGES_PER_USER using BEGIN IMMEDIATE (same pattern as add_group_member_capped).
